title: Second Body
brief: Re-fly the HSA mission on the Heron. The numbers that worked on the Mule do not.
teaches: Portability: a brain that reads the profile (cap.MaxAirspeed / cap.MinAirspeed) and waits for APPROVED ports to a new airframe unchanged. A brain that hardcoded the Mule's Speed:60 is rejected by the Heron's slower envelope.

objective._doc: Same reach-hold mission as 1.2, flown on AX-02 (lower airspeed ceiling, 3-tick approval latency).
